creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to pyrus from comment #0)

> The hidraw driver is needed for Yubi and other usb keys. Hidraw isn't compatible with the USBHID framework.

That's quite backwards. hidraw.ko is in fact a part of the newer usbhid stuff, the old implementation didn't provide it at all. So what is exactly is the software stack here?
